summary: The diff implements REQ-1 largely as specified. AlbumPage.tsx is modified to include a track upload form with audio file input, cover image input, track title text input, and track description textarea, restricted to authenticated owner/admin principals. Backend and query hooks are updated to support the upload. Most acceptance criteria appear to be met. One acceptance criterion — validation preventing submission if audio file or title is missing — cannot be fully confirmed from the truncated diff, but there is no clear evidence it is absent. All required form fields and owner-check logic are present. No NFT minting logic was introduced.
